pageDescriptionAfter: Use our calculator for exact out-of-pocket cost based on treatment type, insurance, and payment plan.
hintTreatmentType: Lite for minor corrections; Comprehensive for complex bite and alignment cases.
hintTotalCost: Enter your provider quote or use the default for your treatment type.
hintInsuranceBenefit: Most plans cover $1,000–$3,000 toward Invisalign. Check your policy for exact benefits.
hintDownPayment: Amount paid upfront before financing the balance.
hintApr: Optional — leave blank or 0 for interest-free in-house plans.
importantBody: This calculator provides estimated Invisalign costs for planning only. Actual pricing varies by provider, location, case complexity, and insurance plan. Always confirm your final quote with a licensed orthodontist and verify benefits with your insurer.
resultsSubtitle: Based on your inputs and common U.S. Invisalign pricing
emptyHint: Enter your treatment details and click “Calculate cost” to see estimates here.
paymentPlanNote: Down payment plus financed balance over your selected term. Compare with in-house 0% APR offers before committing.
proTip1: Call your insurer to confirm orthodontic lifetime maximums before entering your benefit amount.
proTip2: Ask whether retainers, refinements, and follow-up visits are included in the quoted price.
proTip3: Compare in-house 0% APR plans with CareCredit or Lending Club extended terms.
proTip4: Get quotes from 2–3 orthodontists — pricing can vary by thousands for similar cases.
proTip5: Urban providers often charge 20–30% more than suburban clinics for the same treatment.
errTotalCost: Enter a valid total treatment cost (0 or greater).
errInsurance: Enter a valid insurance benefit amount (0 or greater).
errDownPayment: Down payment cannot exceed the out-of-pocket cost.
